approved_control.objective: Execute implementation-level convergence for rust_ylong_http HTTPS proxy SOTA under the approved requirements.
approved_control.success_condition: All ten blocking outcomes and all required result paths have direct evidence, numeric SOTA thresholds pass under fair libcurl-library benchmark conditions, causal real-client-path performance evidence exists, report claims match evidence, and the final independent counterexample gate approves the completion claim.
approved_control.what_counts_as_done: The runtime verifier permits goal_achieved true after code/test/benchmark/report evidence and final counterexample review are recorded. Missing local resources, unavailable external feedback, failed tests, failed numeric thresholds, or missing causal evidence remain unfinished required work rather than a terminal success state.
rules_that_must_not_change: SOTA verified is the only successful terminal state.
curl CLI evidence cannot satisfy libcurl-library hard thresholds.
Correctness, TLS tests, benchmark fairness, or documentation cannot offset a missing SOTA threshold matrix or missing causal performance evidence.
Proxy TLS/mTLS claims require endpoint positive and negative evidence.
Approved requirements and semantic base remain read-only during runtime execution.

required_steps.transition: Current HTTPS proxy implementation is audited before patches are applied.
HTTPS proxy CONNECT handling follows required protocol semantics and fails closed on invalid responses.
Proxy TLS and proxy mutual TLS are verified end to end and kept distinct from origin TLS.
Sync and async proxy semantics are verified and accurately represented.
A contest-critical HTTPS proxy test matrix is implemented and run.
Benchmark methodology and claims are fair, reproducible, and correctly labeled.
README/report narrative is revised to match verified implementation and benchmark evidence.
SOTA performance status is evaluated against the predeclared numeric hard-threshold matrix.
SOTA performance advantage is causally tied to the real ylong_http_client HTTPS proxy implementation and not to benchmark-only shortcuts or mismatched baseline mechanics.
Final SOTA completion claim survives counterexample review.
